Seishinkai

Karate for Modern Life:
Health,
Physical Development,
and Self-Defense

Seishinkai Karate

Seishinkai is a traditional karate dojo that values personal growth, physical well-being, and health over competition-focused training. Students range in age from 3 to 83, and we have been serving the Sapporo community for over 50 years. For children, karate supports healthy physical development; for adults and seniors, it promotes lifelong wellness; and for women, it provides practical self-defense skills through instruction tailored to individual needs. We also offer classes for students who are not currently attending school and welcome international participants, providing a safe and supportive environment where everyone can learn with confidence.

For kids

Improve coordination, discipline, and confidence

For adults & seniors

Gentle full-body exercise and breathing techniques for health

For everyone

Build strength, resilience, and overall wellbeing

For women

Practical self-defense and awareness training

Office Hours

Location

2-1-27 Sakaedori, Shiroishi-ku, Sapporo (along Tohoku-dori)

Please Note

Our office is staffed on a rotating schedule, so we may occasionally be unable to answer phone calls during office hours. In such cases, please contact us by email.
